response.justification: Candidate is a solid hands-on full-stack engineer with ~13 years of professional experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar this role demands. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, AI/ML products at scale, cloud platform strategy, advising strategic customers, or operating as a technical thought leader influencing org-wide direction. Cloud depth is limited (some AWS CDK), and there is no Master's/PhD in an AI field or demonstrated entrepreneurial leadership inside a large org.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Early exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP code generators at current role
Community engagement via talks, workshops, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Below the 15-year senior-IC threshold and no Principal/Director-level scope demonstrated
No recognized AI/ML expertise, published products, or platform-building track record in AI
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product future state

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI products
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
